notes: Game launcher opens, but when pressing play nothing happens
title: Mount & Blade II: Bannerlord

notes: Launcher opens and starts the game successfully. However the game freezes on a black screen and emits the following error: "d3d_device_->CreateInputLayout Failed at rgl GPU_device::create_input _layouts Invalid Parameter". A dialog comes up and you can ignore this error and the game appears to function, ie I can hear button clicks when I click on the screen, but the screen is black so you can't see what you're interacting with.
title: Mount & Blade II: Bannerlord

notes: Game works after October 18th update. Graphical settings finnicky at lower levels, works better on high. Theres a frame ghosting effect that overlays the screen while in game and performance is pretty bad, some tweaking may get it running nicely though.
title: Mount & Blade II: Bannerlord
